questions.question_text_full: An item costs Rs. 400. During a festival sale, a company offers a sale discount that offers x% off on its regular price along with a discount coupon of 10%. The price of the item after using both the sale discount and the discount coupon, is Rs. 216. What is the value of x?
questions.notes: The options are labeled a, b, c, d in the image, mapped to 1, 2, 3, 4 respectively.

questions.question_text_full: If x + y + 3 = 0, then find the value of x³ + y³ - 9xy + 9.
questions.notes: The options are labeled a, b, c, d in the image, mapped to 1, 2, 3, 4 respectively.

questions.question_text_full: AB is a diameter of a circle with centre O. A tangent is drawn at point A. C is a point on the circle such that BC produced meets the tangent at P. If ∠APC = 62°, then find the measure of the minor arc AC.
questions.notes: Question is incomplete on the page; only one option is visible.
